task: Fix Discord webhook initialization bug where local .env vars are ignored when global ~/.config/askr/.env exists
discussion_summary: User's friend had ASKR_DISCORD_WEBHOOK set in local .env but init command wasn't reading it. Root cause: env.load() returns early after loading global config, never merging local .env. Secondary issue in askr.py: send_message() return value was ignored, so success message fired regardless of actual send status. Fixed both: env.py now loads local .env with override=False to fill missing vars, and askr.py now checks send_message() return value before printing success. User also flagged exposed webhook URL — needs regeneration on Discord server.

accomplishments.what: Fixed env.py to load both global and local .env files, with local vars filling in missing globals
Fixed askr.py to check send_message() return value and display appropriate success/failure messages
Identified root cause: env.load() early return prevented local .env from being read

in_progress.what: Modified load() to call load_dotenv(override=False) after global load, allowing local .env to fill missing vars

next_actions.action: Test the fix: run `askr init` in a fresh clone with only local .env (no global ~/.config/askr/.env) to verify local vars are loaded
next_actions.why: Confirm env.py change works correctly for both global-only and local-only scenarios

next_actions.action: Test with both global and local .env present to verify local vars override/fill correctly
next_actions.why: Ensure the override=False behavior merges correctly without breaking existing global config

next_actions.action: Commit changes to askr.py and env.py with message: 'Fix: load local .env vars when global config exists; check send_message return value'
next_actions.why: Changes are complete and tested, ready for version control

next_actions.action: User should regenerate the exposed Discord webhook URL on Discord server (Server Settings → Integrations → Webhooks → Regenerate)
next_actions.why: Webhook URL was visible in chat transcript and is now compromised

decisions.decision: Use override=False in second load_dotenv() call instead of override=True
decisions.reason: Allows local .env to fill in missing variables without overwriting intentional global config values

decisions.decision: Check send_message() return value before printing success message
decisions.reason: Prevents false success messages when webhook send actually fails

failed_approaches.approach: Assumed setup_keys() early return was the root cause
failed_approaches.reason: User clarified .env file already exists in clone with all keys; actual issue was env.load() not reading local .env

relational_files.why: Imports env module; send_message() return value handling depends on env vars being loaded correctly
Tracks session progress and file modifications
